data.body: Investigation (cluster C, sonnet, KERNEL): Taxonomy #10 Brittle API Mapping + #3 Silent Instruction Truncation. ROOT_CAUSE: CLAUDE.md Quick Reference row maps `/dso:review` — but no `dso:review` skill exists in the registered skill list. When fix-bug's commit path calls `Skill("review")`, the Skill tool silently matches the built-in `/review` (GitHub PR review), not the DSO workflow. Quick Reference shorthand is high-locality (read early); COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md redirect to REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md is lower-locality (only reached on full workflow read). PROPOSED_FIXES: (a) CLAUDE.md Quick Reference: replace `/dso:review` row with "Read plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md inline (no /dso:review skill exists; built-in /review is WRONG flow)". (b) CLAUDE.md Always Do These rule 4: change to "read REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md inline. Do NOT call Skill('review')". (c) fix-bug SKILL.md commit-path step: add prohibition on Skill("review"). Note: further verification advised — /dso:review may actually exist as a plugin skill invocation path. Confidence: medium. Minimal-fix applied: true.
